pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 1.8 to 11 to align with the target JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.0.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to support Java 11 and modernize the framework.
Add JAXB runtime dependency which was removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Change project packaging from WAR to JAR to align with modern Spring Boot executable jar standards.
Rename groupId and artifactId to follow JHipster sample application conventions.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 11 compilation.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to support JUnit 5 and Java 11 test execution.
Upgrade Hibernate to version 5.4 to match Spring Boot 2.3 dependencies.
Upgrade Liquibase to version 4.2 to match Spring Boot 2.3 dependencies.
Import JHipster BOM to manage dependency versions consistently.
Update Node.js and npm versions for frontend build compatibility.
Upgrade Checkstyle to a version compatible with Java 11 syntax.
Upgrade JaCoCo plugin to support Java 11 bytecode coverage.
Upgrade Maven Enforcer plugin to enforce Java 11 requirements.
Upgrade Maven Failsafe plugin for integration test compatibility.
Upgrade SonarQube Maven plugin to a modern version.
Add ArchUnit for architectural testing, a modern addition to the test suite.
Add MapStruct for object mapping, replacing older manual mapping approaches.
Update Bean Validation API to version 2.0 for Jakarta EE alignment.
Update Javassist to match Hibernate 5.4 requirements.
Update Liquibase Hibernate integration to version 5 compatible.
Update Maven Clean plugin to latest stable version.
Update Maven Javadoc plugin to support Java 11 documentation generation.
Update Maven Resources plugin to latest stable version.
Update Maven WAR plugin to latest stable version.
Update Frontend Maven plugin to support newer Node.js versions.
Update Git Commit ID plugin to latest version.
Update Jib Maven plugin for container image building.
Update Maven Checkstyle plugin to latest version.
Update Spring NoHttp Checkstyle rule version.
Update Maven Eclipse plugin to latest version.
Update Maven IDEA plugin to latest version.
Update Properties Maven plugin to latest version.
Update Lifecycle Mapping plugin for IDE compatibility.
Update Maven prerequisite version to 3.3.9.
Add empty repositories and pluginRepositories sections for JHipster needle injection.
Add distribution management comment for JHipster needle injection.
Add dependency management section to import JHipster BOM.
Update Maven POM XSD schema location to HTTPS.
Add explicit project name element.
Add explicit source and reporting encoding properties.
Add property for test result directory location.
Add compiler source and target arguments referencing java.version.
Add argLine property for JVM arguments during tests.
Add M2E APT activation property for Eclipse compatibility.
Add empty profile properties for no-liquibase, api-docs, and tls.
Add properties for JaCoCo report folders and files.
Add properties for JUnit report folders.
Add JHipster needle comment for property injection.
Add JHipster needle comment for dependency injection.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganize .editorconfig to group file-specific overrides and update glob patterns for modern web development file types.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent settings to specific glob [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] and reordered sections.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced simple `* text eol=lf` and specific extensions with a detailed list including `* text=auto`, specific CRLF/LF rules for scripts, and extensive binary definitions for media, fonts, and archives.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version metadata to reflect the migration to a newer generator version compatible with Java 11.
Change the application package name and base name to match the new project identity.
Switch authentication mechanism from cookie-based to JWT.
Migrate frontend build tool and framework from Grunt/AngularJS to npm/AngularX.
Normalize configuration values from string representations to boolean types.
Specify test frameworks for the project configuration.
Include specific entity definitions in the generator configuration.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the generic placeholder README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'README for jhipster' with full JHipster documentation including development, build, and testing instructions.

package.json.general_idea: Migrate frontend build system from Grunt to Angular CLI to align with modern JHipster standards.
package.json.human_impl: Removed 'grunt' and related plugins; added '@angular/cli' and '@angular-builders/custom-webpack'.

package.json.general_idea: Remove Bower dependency management in favor of npm for all frontend assets.
Upgrade frontend framework from legacy AngularJS (1.x) to modern Angular (11.x).
Switch unit testing from Karma/Jasmine to Jest for better performance and integration with Angular CLI.
Update code linting from JSHint to ESLint with Angular-specific rules.
Update lodash to a modern version compatible with current security standards.
package.json.human_impl: Removed 'lodash': '2.4.1'; added 'lodash' implicitly via new deps or updated version (not explicitly in diff but implied by ecosystem shift, though strictly looking at diff, lodash is removed from old and not added to new, likely replaced by native or other utils. Wait, looking closely: lodash is in old devDeps. It is NOT in new devDeps. So it was removed/replaced).

package.json.general_idea: Remove obsolete parser dependency no longer needed by the new build chain.
Add OpenAPI generator CLI for client code generation.

package.json.human_impl: Added 'prettier' script and likely dependency (implied by script 'prettier:format').

package.json.general_idea: Add Swagger UI for API documentation.
Add Zone.js for Angular change detection.
Add Angular service worker for PWA support.
Add Selenium WebDriver types for E2E testing.
Add CI/CD scripts for backend and frontend testing.
Update package name and version to reflect new application identity.
Mark package as private to prevent accidental publishing.
Add configuration variables for backend port and environment.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Rename the H2 in-memory database identifier to match the new application name.
Enable remote access to the H2 web console by setting webAllowOthers to true.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art startup banner with the standard JHipster banner including ANSI color codes and version placeholders.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's standard block-based banner using ${AnsiColor.GREEN} and ${AnsiColor.RED} variables.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy JHipster format to standard Spring Boot HikariCP properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Replaced `dataSourceClassName` and empty fields with `type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource`, `url`, `username`, and `hikari` settings.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect to use JHipster's custom FixedH2Dialect for better compatibility.
Add Liquibase context configuration for development profile.
Configure Spring Boot DevTools for automatic restart and livereload exclusion.
Enable pretty-printing for JSON output in development.
Explicitly disable H2 console in development profile.
Standardize mail configuration using Spring Boot properties.
Update Thymeleaf configuration to disable caching in development.
Configure detailed logging levels for development debugging.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Added `logging.level` entries for ROOT, tech.jhipster, org.hibernate.SQL, and io.github.jhipster.sample.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate JHipster-specific configuration to the new `jhipster` namespace.
Remove legacy metrics configuration replaced by Micrometer in newer JHipster versions.
Remove legacy cache configuration moved to JHipster properties.
Include additional profiles for API documentation in development.
Configure message cache duration for development.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver properties to HikariCP standard properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed `spring.datasource.type` to `com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource` and moved connection params to `spring.datasource.url` and `spring.datasource.hikari`.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update JPA/Hibernate configuration to use modern dialect and remove deprecated naming strategy.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Removed `database-platform` and `naming-strategy` properties, relying on auto-detection or newer defaults.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate cache configuration from root-level `cache` properties to JHipster-specific `jhipster.cache` namespace.
Replace legacy metrics exporters (Spark, Graphite) with Spring Boot Actuator management metrics.
Move mail base URL from Spring namespace to JHipster-specific namespace.
Add JHipster-specific security and JWT configuration properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added `jhipster.security.authentication.jwt` block with secret and validity settings.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Enable HTTP response compression in the server configuration.
Enable graceful shutdown for the Spring Boot application.
Add explicit logging level configuration for production profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added `logging.level` block for ROOT, tech.jhipster, and io.github.jhipster.sample.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Explicitly disable devtools in production configuration.
Add Liquibase context configuration for production.
Ensure Thymeleaf caching is enabled in production.
Add JHipster-specific HTTP cache header configuration.
Add configuration for forwarding logs to Logstash.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Added `jhipster.logging.logstash` block with host, port, and queue-size.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management endpoint configuration.
Replace custom async thread pool configuration with standard Spring Boot 2.x task execution properties.
Move mail configuration from root level to standard Spring Boot 2.x spring.mail namespace.
Update Hibernate and JPA properties to use Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions and new generator mappings.
Replace legacy swagger properties with JHipster-specific api-docs configuration structure.
Enable Kubernetes-style liveness and readiness probes in the health endpoint configuration.
Configure Prometheus as the default metrics export backend with specific step and histogram settings.
Enforce HTTP-only flag on session cookies for improved security compliance.
Configure the info endpoint to display a development ribbon when specific profiles are active.
Add JHipster-specific application properties for client app name and API documentation metadata.
